name: Baker Hughes
analysis: Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at $63.4055. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Strong confluence zone at $62.8033 where 3 levels cluster. Trade setup: entry $63.4055, stop $60.8294, target $64.1256. Risk/reward is 0.28:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
